snippet.title: GUH - POCEO OD NULE (Official Music Video)
snippet.description:
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/guhsajan/
Spotify: uskoro...
Deezer: uskoro...

Muzika i Tekst: GUH
Aran≈æman: @jonezr
Mix i Master: @bogi_batina

Kamera: @jovanradoviic
Directed by: GUH, @jovanradoviic
Video Edit & Post Production: @jovanradoviic
https://www.instagram.com/jovanradoviic‚Äã‚Äã

Tekst/Lyrics:

Poceo od nule vidi gde sam tada bio
Igrao sam igru ko da bila je kazino
Kido
Zajedno smo jaki ko Vegito
Preuzimam scenu nece me spreciti niko  (x2)

Al put je dug znaj da cimo sam se kao nikad pre
Nisam znao nista al u glavi imao sam sve
Laptop, daska , krevet, kamera ja jurim svoje sne
To sam ja GUH SAJAN koji ne odustaje

Bio slep
Nisam znao ko pravi drugar je
Mnogo njih se pravi da to jesu, a mnogi su fejk
Svako gleda svoju korist i to gadi mi se eeej
Moram nositi se stime moram paziti na sve

Ja sam gladan uspeha i idem sada ka svom snu
Sujeta ih jede i to ne mogu da prikriju
Maska dole, Maska gore lica manjaju vam se
Polecem polecem, gore zvezde zovu me

Najgore je to sto ljude vidis samo kao broj
Neki gledaju te i pisu ti kako nisi svoj
Vremenom tek vide kolko to pogresna je vest
JEDAN JE GUH SAJAN I NE POSTOJI COPY PASTE

Poceo od nule vidi gde sam tada bio
Igrao sam igru ko da bila je kazino
Kido
Zajedno smo jaki ko Vegito
Preuzimam scenu nece me spreciti niko  (x2)

snippet.title: Mladen ima 32 registrirana old timera 4K
snippet.description:
Mladen Cvitanoviƒá iz Golubinje kod ≈Ωepƒça poznat je po tome ≈°to je prvi Bosanac koji je kupio vlak i vagone kako bi napravio turistiƒçku atrakciju. Lokomotiva i vagoni su u ispravnom stanju. Meƒëutim on je pravi Kralj old timera jer u svojoj kolekciji ima 32 registrirana old timera. Imao je u svojoj kolekciji i Cadillac Elvisa Presleya ali ga je mijenjao za Renault Primaquatre iz 1936. godine. To je kako Mladen tvrdi jedini automobil na svijetu koji je  registriran i nalazi se u njegovoj kolekciji. Mladen pored old timera kupuje i kuƒáe, zemlji≈°ta,  ≈°ume.. Tako je u svome mjestu kupio cijelo selo.  Ljudi su odlazili u svijet a Mladen je kupovao njihove kuƒáe i imanja. Danas sadi voƒáe, uzgaja ovce, koko≈°i. Zanimljivo je napomenuti da Mladen ima polo≈æen ispit za pilota. Vozio je avione i helikoptere ali nikada nije vozio traktor. Pogledajte priƒçu koja vas mo≈æe nadahnuti i podstaknuti da krenete u neki biznis.

en.title: Mladen has 32 registered old timers, 4K video
en.description: Mladen Cvitanoviƒá from Golubinja near ≈Ωepƒçe is known for being the first Bosnian to buy a train and carriages to make a tourist attraction. The locomotive and wagons are in good condition. However, he is the real King of old timers because he has 32 registered old timers in his collection. He also had Elvis Presley's Cadillac in his collection but changed it for a 1936 Renault Primaquatre. This is how Mladen claims to be the only car in the world that is registered and is in his collection. In addition to the old timer, Mladen also buys houses, land, forests ... So he bought the whole village in his place. People went out into the world and Mladen bought their houses and properties. Today he plants fruits, raises sheep and chickens. It is interesting to note that Mladen has passed the pilot exam. He drove airplanes and helicopters, but never drove a tractor. Take a look at a story that can inspire and encourage you to start a business.

snippet.title: Na veƒçeri kod: Bojan Vaskoviƒá / sezona 2 / ep7
snippet.description:
Sledeƒái domaƒáin tima So koji ƒáe u svom domu ugostiti ekipu Biber je Bojan Vaskoviƒá, frontmen jednog od najpopularnijih bendova domaƒáe muziƒçke scene - "Lexington".
Ovaj roƒëeni Sarajlija otkriva kako je pred granatama bio prinuƒëen da napusti rodni grad i ≈°ta je sve pro≈°ao dok se nije skuƒáio u prestonici. Nesuƒëenom fudbaleru je omiljeni sport zaista najva≈ænija sporedna stvar na svetu i jedino oko ƒçega ume da se "zakaƒçi" sa svojom suprugom.
Videƒáete kako se Bojan sna≈°ao na pijaci a kako u kuhinji i za≈°to njegova lep≈°a polovina ka≈æe da je tu, prvenstveno, odliƒçan degustator.

Duhovit i ≈°armantan, Bojan se pokazao kao veseo, raspevan i zabavan domaƒáin Tijani Dapƒçeviƒá, Zorani Paviƒá, Sanji Vuƒçiƒá, Borisu Pingoviƒáu, Nigoru i Veljku Kuzmanƒçeviƒáu koji je svojim komentarima zabavio i svoju ekipu i domaƒáine.

snippet.title: HIT!! PRELIJTE VRELOM VODOM BRA≈ÝNO I DOBIƒÜETE NAJHRSKAVIJE PIRO≈ÝKE!! Bez kvasca a ukusnije od pite!
snippet.description:
Pozdrav dragi prijatelji po≈°tovane domaƒáice i domaƒáini.Piro≈°ke koje imaju ukus neodoljive pite na jedan sasvim neobiƒçan naƒçin.Bez kvasca i ƒçekanja,testo je rastresito,hrskavo i tako ukusno da mu retko ko odoleva.S obzirom da je testo posno mo≈æe se koristiti i u posnoj i u mrsnoj trpezi.Sve zavisi od punjenja i va≈°eg ukusa.Zato ne propustite a da ne isprobate ovaj recept.
SASTOJCI
300ml. vrele vode
1 ka≈°iƒçica ≈°eƒáer
1 ka≈°iƒçica so
20-30ml. ulje
550gr. bra≈°no +- 50gr.
1 pra≈°ak za pecivo
Ulje za pr≈æenje.
‚ñ¨‚ñ¨‚ñ¨‚ñ¨‚ñ¨‚ñ¨‚ñ¨‚ñ¨‚ñ¨‚ñ¨‚ñ¨‚ñ¨‚ñ¨‚ñ¨‚ñ¨‚ñ¨‚ñ¨‚ñ¨‚ñ¨

Hello dear friends, dear housewives and hosts. Pies that taste like an irresistible pie in a very unusual way. Without yeast and waiting, the dough is loose, crunchy and so delicious that rarely anyone can resist it. and it depends on the filling and your taste. So don't miss it without trying this recipe.
INGREDIENTS
300ml. boiling water
1 teaspoon sugar
1 teaspoon are
20-30ml. oil
550gr. flour + - 50gr.
1 baking powder
Frying oil.

snippet.title: Space Jam: A New Legacy ‚Äì Trailer 1
snippet.description:
Tunes vs. Goons. Watch LeBron James and Bugs Bunny in the new trailer for Space Jam: A New Legacy. In theaters and streaming on HBO Max ‚Äì July 16. #SpaceJamMovie 

-----------------
https://www.facebook.com/SpaceJamMovie‚Äã
https://www.instagram.com/SpaceJamMovie/‚Äã
https://twitter.com/spacejammovie/‚Äã
-----------------
Welcome to the Jam!  Basketball champion and global icon LeBron James goes on an epic adventure alongside timeless Tune Bugs Bunny with the animated/live-action event ‚ÄúSpace Jam: A New Legacy,‚Äù from director Malcolm D. Lee and an innovative filmmaking team including Ryan Coogler and Maverick Carter.  This transformational journey is a manic mashup of two worlds that reveals just how far some parents will go to connect with their kids. When LeBron and his young son Dom are trapped in a digital space by a rogue A.I., LeBron must get them home safe by leading Bugs, Lola Bunny and the whole gang of notoriously undisciplined Looney Tunes to victory over the A.I.‚Äôs digitized champions on the court: a powered-up roster of professional basketball stars as you‚Äôve never seen them before.  It‚Äôs Tunes versus Goons in the highest-stakes challenge of his life, that will redefine LeBron‚Äôs bond with his son and shine a light on the power of being yourself. The ready-for-action Tunes destroy convention, supercharge their unique talents and surprise even ‚ÄúKing‚Äù James by playing the game their own way.

James stars alongside Oscar nominee Don Cheadle (the ‚ÄúAvengers‚Äù films, ‚ÄúHotel Rwanda‚Äù), Khris Davis (‚ÄúJudas and the Black Messiah,‚Äù TV‚Äôs ‚ÄúAtlanta‚Äù), Sonequa Martin-Green (TV‚Äôs ‚ÄúThe Walking Dead,‚Äù ‚ÄúStar Trek: Discovery‚Äù), newcomer Cedric Joe, Jeff Bergman (‚ÄúLooney Tunes Cartoons‚Äù), Eric Bauza (‚ÄúLooney Tunes Cartoons‚Äù), and Zendaya (upcoming ‚ÄúDune,‚Äù ‚ÄúMalcolm & Marie‚Äù).

Lee (‚ÄúGirls Trip,‚Äù ‚ÄúNight School‚Äù) directs from a screenplay by Juel Taylor & Tony Rettenmaier & Keenan Coogler & Terence Nance.  The film‚Äôs producers are Ryan Coogler, LeBron James, Maverick Carter and Duncan Henderson, and the executive producers are Sev Ohanian, Zinzi Coogler, Allison Abbate, Jesse Ehrman, Jamal Henderson, Spencer Beighley, Justin Lin, Terence Nance and Ivan Reitman.

The director‚Äôs behind-the-scenes creative team includes director of photography Salvatore Totino (‚ÄúSpider-Man: Homecoming‚Äù), animation producer Troy Nethercott (‚ÄúWonder Park‚Äù), production designers Kevin Ishioka (‚ÄúThe Mule‚Äù), Akin McKenzie (Netflix‚Äôs ‚ÄúWhen They See Us‚Äù) and Clint Wallace (upcoming ‚ÄúEternals‚Äù), editor Bob Ducsay (‚ÄúGodzilla: King of the Monsters,‚Äù ‚ÄúStar Wars Episode VIII ‚Äì The Last Jedi‚Äù) and costume designer Melissa Bruning (‚ÄúRampage,‚Äù ‚ÄúWar for the Planet of the Apes‚Äù).  The music is by Kris Bowers (‚ÄúGreenbook,‚Äù Netflix‚Äôs ‚ÄúBridgerton‚Äù).

Warner Bros. Pictures Presents a Proximity/The SpringHill Company Production, a Malcolm D. Lee Film, ‚ÄúSpace Jam: A New Legacy.‚Äù  The film will be distributed worldwide by Warner Bros. Pictures.  It will be released in theaters nationwide on July 16, 2021 and will be available in the U.S. on HBO Max for 31 days from theatrical release.

snippet.title: BMW M4 v AMG C63 v Audi RS5 - DRAG RACE
snippet.description:
Need help buying your next car? Click https://www.carwow.co.uk/-help-me-carwow‚Äã and my team and I will help you choose your ideal car at a fair price - from Mat Watson!
.............................................................

How‚Äôs this for an all-new epic drag race! 

We‚Äôve got Mat in the all-new BMW M4, and he‚Äôs lining up alongside the Mercedes-AMG C63 S & Audi RS5!

So how do they match up? First up we've got the M4, and under the bonnet you‚Äôll find a 3-litre straight-six which can deliver 510hp & 660Nm of torque. 

As for the AMG, well it‚Äôs not too different. It may have a 4-litre twin-turbo V8 instead, but it can also deliver 510hp, coupled with 700Nm. Finally we have the RS5, which has a 2.9-litre V6 which can put down 450hp and 600Nm of torque. 

Think the Audi is the underdog? Well it has one key benefit - Quattro AWD! As for both the BMW and AMG? Well, they've only got RWD! Will that make the difference? You‚Äôll have to keep watching to find out!

Check out our German YouTube channel - https://www.youtube.com/carwow-Deutschland

Yaman Kƒ±rƒ±mlƒ± is a successful and young businessman who had a rough childhood but never gave up, on the contrary he even became stronger with every obstacle. He started his life from the bottom and became very wealthy. All he has in his world, is a family that he has to take care of after his father‚Äôs death. He closed his heart to all romantic feelings a long time ago and his only weakness is his 5-year old nephew‚Ä¶ Little Yusuf is very well protected under his uncle‚Äôs arms, but he craves loves and sympathy. The only happy image in his mind is his aunt Seher. 
 
Seher is a beautiful and humble girl living with her grandfather. Her life is shaken by the death of her sister who was the bride of the Kƒ±rƒ±mlƒ± family. From now on, she has a legacy she has to take care at all costs: Her little nephew Yusuf. This adventure will arise the long hidden secrets of the Kƒ±rƒ±mlƒ± mansion; while a whole another legacy will start to grow in Seher and Yaman's hearts.
